note: Nevada said Prime Trust could not honor customer withdrawals.
Forbes reported Nevada's statement that Prime Trust had a customer-funds shortfall.
BitGo terminated its planned acquisition before the regulator's public action.
Nevada issued a cease-and-desist order after Prime Trust's unsafe or unsound condition.
Nevada petitioned to place Prime Trust into receivership.
The court approved temporary receivership pending further proceedings.
The Nevada FID petition framed Prime Trust as a custody infrastructure failure with customer-impact questions.
